one_time_items.description: Net unrealized gains on non-marketable equity securities

evidence_phrases: 2026 is off to a terrific start
Our AI investments and full stack approach are lighting up every part of the business
This was our strongest quarter ever for our consumer AI plans
These outstanding results are built on our differentiated, full stack approach
qualitative_signals.ceo_quote_primary: 2026 is off to a terrific start. Our AI investments and full stack approach are lighting up every part of the business. Search had a strong quarter with AI experiences driving usage, queries at an all time high, and 19% revenue growth. Google Cloud revenues grew 63% with backlog nearly doubling quarter on quarter to over $460 billion. This was our strongest quarter ever for our consumer AI plans, driven by the Gemini App. Overall the number of paid subscriptions has now reached 350 million, with YouTube and Google One being the key drivers. Gemini Enterprise has great momentum with 40% quarter on quarter growth in paid monthly active users. And, finally, I'm pleased to see Waymo surpass 500,000 fully autonomous rides a week. These outstanding results are built on our differentiated, full stack approach. Our first-party models, like Gemini, are now processing more than 16 billion tokens per minute via direct API use by our customers, up 60% from last quarter. It's really exciting to see how our AI investments are delivering value for our users, customers and business.

ambiguous_items.explanation: Computed: ($109,896 - $113,828) / $113,828 = -3.45%, rounded to -3%. Not explicitly stated as percentage in document; derived from Q4 2025 total revenues $113,828 million and Q1 2026 $109,896 million.
Computed: Google Services operating income $40,589 / revenue $89,637 = 45.3%. Not explicitly stated in document.
Computed: Google Cloud operating income $6,598 / revenue $20,028 = 32.9%. Not explicitly stated in document.
Computed: ($411 - $450) / $450 = -8.7%. Not explicitly stated as percentage in document.

Document states 'net gain of $37.7 billion' in narrative but table shows 'Gain (loss) on equity securities, net' of $36,915 million. Using table figure $36,915 million as more precise. The $37.7 billion narrative figure appears to include other components or be rounded.
